CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK( LOI_Date__c )), TEXT(DAY(LOI_Date__c )) & " " & CASE(MONTH(LOI_Date__c ), 1, "Jan", 2, "Feb", 3, "Mar", 4, "Apr", 5, "May", 6, "Jun", 7, "Jul", 8, "Aug", 9, "Sep", 10, "Oct", 11, "Nov", 12, "Dec", "" ) & " " & TEXT(YEAR(LOI_Date__c )), IF( NOT( pro_LOI_Date_Required__c ), "NA", "" ) )
CustomField.label: LOI Date
